actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 21-year-old player has joined Luton Town on a season-long loan.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Scottish government has approved a two-phase development for a distillery in Mossburn.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A rave has been reported in Avonside Industrial Estate, off Feeder Road, in the early hours.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A car has been in collision with a van at the junction of Fryers Road and Leamore Lane, in Bloxwich, at about 23:00 BST on Sunday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman and a 29-year-old man have been recovered from the water after police heard shouts near Wandsworth Bridge at 23:45 GMT on Tuesday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 19-year-old player has signed for Brighton and Hove Albion.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The first round of funding for Poole Park follows a fundraising campaign by the Friends of Poole Park.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 24-year-old player has been diagnosed with a lesion of the ligament in his right ankle, and is being treated with a 21-day rest period.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: One casualty was taken to hospital by air ambulance, while two others made their own way for treatment.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Officers with assault rifles and in bomb disposal suits were seen entering one house and searching it.
